title: Darwin Water Ambience
body:
Adds water effects such as Rain Ripples & Water Waves!

Should work with every mod liquid that has Material.water!


Current Features (Images in gallery):


Water Trails!
![Water Trails!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f203db1bb0c7f1d32e1f3980f1b458316f4a1f0f.jpeg)

Water Ripples while Raining!
![Water Ripples while Raining!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13ae3084c8deb6a9bd385196cfc39eeff92c4cb5.jpeg)

Water Splashes for Entities and Items!
![Water Splashes for Entities and Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e32634c08042b58fb59cc603c910abff7d742cb.jpeg)

Credits: Ninifey, Brandyn, Gamingb3ast
